title: Overworld Biome Additions
description: The datapack adds structures for each biome in Minecraft.
body:
# **Overworld Biome Additions**
The datapack adds structures for each biome in Minecraft.

## **Description**
### **Structures**
In the latest version of the datapack, the following structures are available:
- **oak_house** for plains and forests
- **birch_house** for all birch forest types
- **jungle_house** for all jungle types
- **savanna_house** for all savanna types
- **desert_house** for deserts and all badlands types
- **taiga_house** for all taiga types except snowy taiga
- **snowy_taiga_house** for snowy plains and snowy taiga
- **cherry_house** for cherry grove
- **dark_oak_house** for dark forest
- **hill_house** for all windstep hills types
- **swamp_house** for swamps
- **mangrove_swamp_house** for mangrove swamps

But more structures will be added with each update! And every structure has its own unique loot in barrels.

Example /locate command for structures:
```
/locate structure example:oak_house
```
